description: A ground-level photograph depicts a vibrant green agricultural field, likely planted with maize (corn), under a bright sky. A concrete irrigation channel, filled with flowing water, traverses the foreground from left to right, featuring a semicircular collection basin at its visible origin on the left. The channel is supported by concrete structures. Beyond the cultivated area, the landscape includes scattered deciduous trees and shrubs. The image captures a lush environment, characteristic of a growing season. The source of the image is CNES 2013©, distributed by Airbus DS/Spot, and it was taken on 2013-08-05.
